title: kaempferia nemoralis
intro: Kaempferia nemoralis, also known as Black Ginger or Krachai Dam, is a type of rhizome plant that belongs to the ginger family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Kaempferia nemoralis include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as improving circulation and digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Kaempferia nemoralis is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and topical creams, and is also used in traditional Thai medicine.
